purpose: Deterministic pre-filter for PTFE compound/filler family screening before LLM generation
warning: Qualitative screen only. Final selection requires grade-specific datasheets/tests and application conditions (PV, counterface, medium, temperature, purity).

match_policy.forbidden_conditions_logic: ANY match => exclude candidate pending explicit override justification

forbidden_conditions: High continuous mechanical load (> 5 MPa at RT) without creep validation
compound_decision_matrix.recommended_use: Static seals, UHP fluid handling (with qualification), extreme chemicals, FDA/Pharma (grade/compliance specific).

custom_blocks: High PV dynamic sealing not recommended without validated grade-specific test data.
Abrasive media increases wear risk; screen out for severe abrasion unless sacrificial design accepted.
High continuous load >5 MPa at RT requires creep validation and anti-extrusion design.

forbidden_conditions: Soft counterface (e.g., Aluminum, Bronze, Unhardened Steel < 45 HRC)
compound_decision_matrix.recommended_use: General dynamic seals against hardened steel, oxidative environments (validate wear/counterface finish).

custom_blocks: Avoid soft counterfaces due to abrasive wear; hardened shafts and controlled finish required.

forbidden_conditions: Dry running without trace moisture (depending on graphite type and tribo-pair)
compound_decision_matrix.recommended_use: Water/steam applications, higher PV sliding against medium-hard shafts, chemical pumps (validate galvanic/contamination context).

custom_blocks: Graphite/carbon grades may compromise insulation and UHP cleanliness; validate tribopair and contamination budget.

forbidden_conditions: Food / Pharma contact (unless explicitly compliant grade and application allows)
compound_decision_matrix.recommended_use: Hydraulic cylinders, machine tool guideways, high compressive mechanical load in compatible media.

custom_blocks: Bronze-filled grades incompatible with many corrosive/oxidizing media and conductive by design.

forbidden_conditions: Extremely strong oxidizing acids (for some polymer fillers)
Temperatures exceeding degradation point of the specific filler system
compound_decision_matrix.recommended_use: Rotary seals against soft metal shafts (Al, Brass), dry-running gas compressors (with validation).

custom_blocks: Specific polymer filler chemistry/temperature limits must be checked grade-by-grade.
